mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua在80步内找到Tree View演示页面但无法有效检测高亮条宽度差异。观察到Tree View组件展示了文件夹嵌套结构，但mano-cua截图分辨率不足以精确测量各层级高亮条右侧边距差异（bug为mr-2导致每层缩窄0.5rem）。该bug为纯CSS像素级问题，mano-cua截图对比方式难以检测。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Found Tree View demo page but could not effectively measure highlight bar width differences across nesting levels. The bug is a subtle CSS right-margin issue (mr-2 causing 0.5rem shrinkage per nesting level) that is difficult to detect via screenshot comparison.
